awards.name: ACS Skills Assessment
awards.description: Positively assessed by the Australian Computer Society — the authoritative body for ICT professionals in Australia. Qualifies for skilled migration visa subclasses 189, 190, and 491, enabling direct employment at Australian banks and technology firms.

awards.name: Technical Delivery Excellence
awards.organization: FWD Technology and Innovation Malaysia Sdn. Bhd
awards.description: Recognised for outstanding technical leadership and delivery of enterprise-grade insurance platform features serving millions of FWD customers across Malaysia.

awards.name: Digital Transformation Champion
awards.description: Awarded for leading the successful modernisation of critical banking workflows and delivering high-impact data visualisation dashboards with Power BI for Maybank Malaysia.

awards.name: Best Innovation Project
awards.description: Received best project recognition during undergraduate studies for building an automated academic scheduling system, demonstrating early passion for enterprise software solutions.

certifications.name: IELTS — International English Language Testing System
certifications.provider: British Council / IDP — Band 6.0 and above
